japanese: ブチャラティ、来た！
english: Bucciarati is here!

japanese: フォッフォッフォッ
english: Fosh fosh fosh fosh. (alt wording 28)

japanese: 守るものがある限り、俺は負けない
romaji: Mamoru mono ga aru kagiri, ore wa makenai
english: As long as I have something to protect, I won't lose.

japanese: 大丈夫、僕最強だから
english: Relax, I'm the strongest.

japanese: マママママ
english: Mama mama mama. (alt wording 29)

japanese: やれやれだぜ
english: Good grief

japanese: 俺は漢
english: I am a man

japanese: 興味ない
english: Not interested

japanese: 勝敗は兵家の常
english: Victory and defeat are common

japanese: демон
english: Demon

japanese: 諦めないってばよ!
english: I never give up, believe it! (alt wording 33) (alt wording 85)

japanese: マママママ
english: Mama mama mama.

japanese: 普通の生活がしたいだけなんだ
romaji: Futsuu no seikatsu ga shitai dake nanda
english: All I want is to live a normal life. (alt wording 40)

japanese: チャンピオンに、俺はなる！
english: I wanna be the very best.

japanese: 俺を誰だと思ってやがる!
romaji: Ore o dare da to omotte yagaru!
english: Who the hell do you think I am! (alt wording 46)

japanese: 俺は人間をやめるぞ！ジョジョーーッ！！
romaji: Ore wa ningen o yameru zo! Jojo!!
english: I'm going to stop being human, JoJo! (alt wording 12) (alt wording 64)

japanese: イエス！イエス！イエス！イエス！
english: Yes! Yes! Yes! Yes! (alt wording 2)

japanese: 何ッ！？
english: What?! (alt wording 19) (alt wording 71)

japanese: 俺は海賊王になる！
romaji: Ore wa kaizoku ou ni naru!
english: I'm gonna be King of the Pirates! (alt wording 20) (alt wording 72)

japanese: まだだ、まだ終わらんよ！
english: Not yet! It's not over yet! (alt wording 22) (alt wording 74)

japanese: グララララ
english: Gurararara!

japanese: シシシシシ
english: Shishishi! (alt wording 30) (alt wording 82)

japanese: ゼハハハハ
english: Ze ha ha ha! (alt wording 32) (alt wording 84)

japanese: 仲間を大切にしない奴はそれ以上のクズだ

english: Those who don't take care of their comrades are worse than scum. (alt wording 34) (alt wording 86)

japanese: 次にお前は「やれやれだぜ」と言う！
romaji: Tsugi ni omae wa 'yare yare da ze' to iu!
english: Next you'll say, 'Good grief!'

english: Fosh fosh fosh fosh.

english: Miracles rain down on the heads of those who never give up!

japanese: 生殺与奪の権を他人に握らせるな!
romaji: Seisatsu yodatsu no ken o tanin ni nigiraseru na!

english: Don't let anyone else take control of your life and death!

romaji: Akirametara soko de shiai shuuryou desu yo...?
english: If you give up, that's the end of the game.

japanese: 僕は新世界の神となる
romaji: Boku wa shin sekai no kami to naru
english: I will become the god of the new world. (alt wording 44)

romaji: Boku wa shin sekai no kami to naru

japanese: おれは人間を超越する！
romaji: Ore wa ningen o chouetsu suru!
english: I will transcend humanity!

english: Equivalent exchange. To obtain, something of equal value must be lost.
